zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht於大約1465年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾時，她的父親Peder Eriksson Örnflycht18歲，母親Karin Arendtsdotter12歲。她於大約1495年與Nils Erlandsson Kagge在瑞典索德曼藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1511年在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht于大约1465年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉維亞斯特拉 雷德格藍納馬爾时，她的父亲Peder Eriksson Örnflycht18岁，母亲Karin Arendtsdotter12岁。她于大约1495年与Nils Erlandsson Kagge在瑞典索德曼藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1511年在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht was born about 1465, in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Sweden, her father, Peder Eriksson Örnflycht, was 18 and her mother, Karin Arendtsdotter, was 12. She married Nils Erlandsson Kagge about 1495, in Södermanland, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1511, in Floda, Södermanland, Sweden, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht est née environ 1465, à Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suède, son père, Peder Eriksson Örnflycht, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Karin Arendtsdotter, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Nils Erlandsson Kagge environ 1495, à Södermanland, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1511, à Floda, Södermanland, Suède, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht um 1465 in Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peder Eriksson Örnflycht 18 und ihre Mutter Karin Arendtsdotter 12. Sie hat um 1495 in Södermanland, Schweden Nils Erlandsson Kagge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1511 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Floda, Södermanland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht è nata il circa 1465 nel Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Svezia, sua padre, Peder Eriksson Örnflycht, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Karin Arendtsdotter, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Nils Erlandsson Kagge circa 1495, nel Södermanland, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1511, nel Floda, Södermanland, Svezia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Pedersdotter Örnflychtが約1465年にスウェーデンウップサラvaストラ リドグランハンマーで生まれた時，父Peder Eriksson Örnflychtは18歳，母Karin Arendtsdotterは12歳であった。約1495年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドでNils Erlandsson Kaggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1511年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフロダで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht(이)가 대략 1465년 스웨덴 업프사라 브a스트라 리드 그랜해마에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peder Eriksson Örnflycht(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Karin Arendtsdotter(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드에서 Nils Erlandsson Kagge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 플로다에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suécia, seu pai, Peder Eriksson Örnflycht, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Karin Arendtsdotter, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Nils Erlandsson Kagge aproximadamente 1495, em Södermanland, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1511, em Floda, Södermanland, Suécia, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht родилась около 1465 г. в местности гранаммар, вaстра рид, уппсала, Швеция, её отцу по имени Peder Eriksson Örnflycht было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Karin Arendtsdotter, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nils Erlandsson Kagge около 1495 г. в местности сoдирманланд, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1511 г. в местности флода, сoдирманланд, Швеция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht nació aproximadamente 1465, en Granhammar, Västra Ryd, Uppsala, Suecia, su papá, Peder Eriksson Örnflycht, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Karin Arendtsdotter, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Nils Erlandsson Kagge aproximadamente 1495, en Södermanland, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1511, en Floda, Södermanland, Suecia, a la edad de 47 años.
